CustomField.description: This field is used in the "Custom UI" (Generate NetSuite Order) and the details captured are sent to NetSuite through Integration (ITSFDC-5103)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used in the "Custom UI" (Generate NetSuite Order) and the details captured are sent to NetSuite through Integration (ITSFDC-5103)
CustomField.label: Fullfillment Notes
